strategy: Hit with your strongest school (he resists 30% to all). Bring a HoT like Spritely, it is central here.

He Poisons the whole team every third round, then Detonates any DoT for heavy Shadow damage at the end of every round. Keep a HoT active positioned before the DoT to stop the detonation (the HoT is not consumed).
Do not cast direct heals, a heal makes him Natural-Attack you for 75+1430 Shadow. Use the HoT portion of heals (Spritely) instead, which does not trigger it.
Use Mass Feint or an Indemnity-protected Feint, a plain Feint makes him Cleanse-Ward all your traps off.
Stack blades and a protected Feint, keep a HoT up against the Poison, then land one big hit.
cheatNotes: Join late and from Round 3 he hits you with Bad Juju.
He Poisons the whole team every third round, a DoT you will want to manage before his Detonate.
At the end of every round he Detonates any DoT on the team for big Shadow damage, keep DoTs off yourself.
A HoT placed before the DoT stops that DoT from detonating, and the HoT is not removed, run Spritely to neutralize his Poison.
Plain Feint makes him Cleanse-Ward all unprotected traps off himself.
Mass Feint does not trigger the trap cleanse, use it instead.
Indemnity also protects your Feint from the cleanse.
Cast a direct heal and he Natural-Attacks you for 75+1430 Shadow, avoid flat heals.
The HoT portion of a heal does not trigger that attack, so heal with HoTs.
Pet maycast heals occasionally trigger the attack, watch your pet.
